goal: Consolidate text documentation that links upper-computer ROS2 changes with lower-computer STM32/ESP01S changes.
deliverable: traceability artifacts for this documentation pass
constraints: No local build, ROS launch/run, topic/node/tf checks, or hardware access.
Do not rename legacy mojibake Chinese markdown filenames.
acceptance: Document covers serial ports, velocity scale, heading/IMU, odometry, control arbitration, and navigation fusion.
Document references upper and lower key files.
Document includes remote verification boundary and commands.
